title: Prompt Window
content: Prompt window la bo nho ngan han duoc inject vao moi lan goi model. No thuong gom short-term context, profile facts quan trong, episodic records lien quan va semantic hits can thiet.

title: Vector Store
content: Vector store la backend pho bien cho semantic memory. No giup retrieve cac doan tai lieu co y nghia gan voi query thay vi chi match keyword.

title: Conflict Handling
content: Khi user sua fact cu, fact moi phai duoc uu tien thay vi append ca hai gia tri mau thuan vao profile.

title: Privacy and TTL
content: Memory dai han co the chua PII. He thong can consent, deletion flow, TTL va audit de tranh luu thong tin nhay cam qua lau.

title: Docker Debug Lesson
content: Trong nhieu bai debug local-stack, nen dung docker service name thay vi localhost khi service giao tiep trong cung docker network.

title: Semantic Retrieval Fallback
content: Neu chua co vector database, keyword search fallback van duoc chap nhan neu giao dien semantic memory ro rang.
